name: checkout-worktree
description: Create your own links to checkout any git worktree or PR branch locally and open it in VS Code-compatible editors.

checkout-worktree.gitFolders.description: Folders containing your git repositories (e.g. '~/projects'). Scanned one level deep to find existing repos by name.

checkout-worktree.worktreeParentDir.description: Parent directory for new worktrees. Defaults to '.worktrees/' inside the repo root (added to .gitignore if not already present).

checkout-worktree.postCheckoutCommand.description: Shell command to run in the worktree directory after checkout (e.g. 'mise trust && mise run worktree:setup'). Runs only for newly created worktrees.
